review_strategy.sample_quality_assessment: All 4 extractions show strong evidence discipline: SOURCE references are consistently formatted as file:line, business rules are enumerated with explicit triggers and conditions, constants and enums are tabulated exhaustively, and GAP markers are applied correctly when source evidence is absent or ambiguous. No hallucination indicators detected. Depth is high across backend (config, LLM client, prompts, skill hierarchy) and frontend (Streamlit components, scoring logic, session state). Minor risk: regex_detection_skills.py is large (~500+ LOC) and the skills extraction correctly flags unexported symbols — spot-check should verify that RAG extraction and checklist skills are covered with equal depth.
review_strategy.reviewer_count_rationale: 4 clusters totalling 54 source files. The single-reviewer cap is max_source_files=50, so 54 files requires at least 2 reviewers (ceil(54/50)=2). LOC (4,927) and cluster count (4) are well under their caps (12,000 and 8 respectively). Two reviewers are sufficient: one covers the cohesive backend+frontend module group (33 files, 3,585 LOC, 3 clusters) and one covers root/tests/scratch (21 files, 1,342 LOC, 1 cluster). Both are within all hard caps.

verification_focus: Verify SOURCE file:line citations in extracted_backend_core_01.md and extracted_backend_skills_01.md against actual source files — spot-check backend/common/config.py (env var table), backend/common/prompts.py (prompt templates), and backend/skills/regex_detection_skills.py (unexported skill classes)
Confirm all 14 exported __all__ symbols in backend/skills/__init__.py are documented and that the 9+ unexported regex skills are correctly flagged as absent from the registry
Check that LLMClient retry/backoff logic, Gemini API parameters, and error handling paths in backend/common/llm_client.py are captured with depth (not just NAME_ONLY)
Verify PaperAuditor 4-phase pipeline and SotaAnalyzer 5-step pipeline are described with sequencing, data flow, and inter-phase dependencies
Validate Streamlit UI coverage: session_state keys, upload flow, audit results rendering, chatbot interaction, gauge chart thresholds, and SOTA section triggers (extracted_frontend_01.md)
Check scoring.py CHECKLIST_KEYS (16 items) and CHECKLIST_LABELS are fully enumerated with correct labels
Confirm GAP markers are legitimately used (not used to hide known content) by cross-checking against source files
extraction_reviewers.scope: Quality review of extractions for the backend infrastructure (common config, LLM client, prompts, core services, utils), the backend skills subsystem (base skill, auditor/chatbot/SOTA/RAG/regex skills, skill registry), and the Streamlit frontend (app entry, UI components, styles, scoring, session state). Spot-check 15-25% of source files per cluster, prioritising files cited as evidence, the largest files (prompts.py, regex_detection_skills.py, audit_results.py), and any files carrying GAP markers.

verification_focus: Verify root app.py (89 LOC) is documented with its Streamlit page config, upload flow, and audit result orchestration — confirm it is distinct from frontend/app.py coverage
Spot-check md_to_pdf.py (325 LOC) and pdf_to_md.py (159 LOC) for completeness: CLI argument parsing, conversion logic, error handling, and reportlab/pymupdf4llm integration

Validate test suite coverage in extracted_root_tests_scratch_01.md: test_auditor_refactor.py, test_skills_integration.py (integration tests), and tests/ unit tests (test_rag_logical_splitter, test_section_splitter, test_audit_state)
Confirm requirements.txt dependencies are listed with their resolved roles in the architecture
Check that scratch scripts (patch_skills.py, repro_hyperparams.py, etc.) are categorised correctly as non-production utilities and not confused with production business logic
Verify SOURCE references in extraction point to correct line ranges for multi-file CLI scripts
Confirm GAP markers are applied where scratch scripts lack docstrings or have ambiguous intent
extraction_reviewers.scope: Quality review of the extraction for root-level scripts, CLI utilities, test suites, and scratch experiments (cluster_root_tests_scratch_01). Spot-check 15-25% of the 21 source files, prioritising the largest (md_to_pdf.py 325 LOC, create_test_pdf.py 184 LOC, test_skills_integration.py 164 LOC) and any files flagged with GAP markers. Cross-check that test assertions captured in the extraction align with what the source tests actually assert.

review_consolidator.scope: Merge all reviewer reports into extraction_consolidated.md. Aggregate per-cluster depth_pct and coverage_pct scores, apply status thresholds (pass: depth>=95 AND coverage>=95; needs_review: depth>=80 AND coverage>=85; needs_reextraction: depth<80 OR coverage<85), identify cross-cluster inconsistencies (e.g. same skill class described differently in backend_core vs backend_skills extractions), and produce a final verdict with a prioritised list of issues for the fix phase.
